summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
summary.en: Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 claude-helper 相关功能、提示词与任务引导、claude-provider 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、提示词与任务引导、claude-provider 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、提示词与任务引导、claude-provider 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

enforce UTF-8 without BOM in optimize proposal bundle相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了enforce UTF-8 without BOM in optimize proposal bundle相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 提示词与任务引导、proposal 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 通常不需要额外迁移步骤，这一版本主要改善现有流程的稳定性。

项目与工作区相关链路

  • 变更说明: 优化了项目与工作区相关链路，减少切换和打开过程中的使用障碍。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project-scope 相关功能、claude-provider 相关功能、claude-helper 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Model

  • Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.
  • Impact: Affects Claude Helper, prompt and task guidance, Claude Provider.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing model entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, prompt and task guidance, Claude Provider.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, prompt and task guidance, Claude Provider.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing supporting work entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to enforce UTF-8 without BOM in optimize proposal bundle.
  • Impact: Affects prompt and task guidance, Proposal.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Project and workspace flows

  • Change Summary: Refined project and workspace flows to reduce friction when switching or opening code targets.
  • Impact: Affects Project Scope, Claude Provider, Claude Helper.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.
